# Neighborhood

Build spatial graphs used by domain / SVG methods.

**4 registered method(s)** in this category.

| Method | Maturity | Implementation | Summary | Guide |
|--------|----------|----------------|---------|-------|
| `weave_adaptive_radius_graph` | `experimental` | `native` | Local-k-distance radii with symmetric Gaussian-weighted edges. | [weave_adaptive_radius_graph](../generated/weave_adaptive_radius_graph.md) |
| `weave_expression_spatial_graph` | `experimental` | `native` | Spatial-expression fused k-nearest-neighbour graph. | [weave_expression_spatial_graph](../generated/weave_expression_spatial_graph.md) |
| `weave_mutual_knn_graph` | `experimental` | `native` | Reciprocal spatial k-nearest-neighbour graph. | [weave_mutual_knn_graph](../generated/weave_mutual_knn_graph.md) |
| `spatial_graph` | `production` | `native` | Spatial k-NN graph construction + per-node graph metrics. | [spatial_graph](../generated/spatial_graph.md) |

## Decision notes

### `spatial_graph`

- Build spatial graphs used by domain / SVG methods.
- Spatial k-NN graph construction + per-node graph metrics.
- Full page: [spatial_graph](../generated/spatial_graph.md)

### `weave_adaptive_radius_graph`

- Build spatial graphs used by domain / SVG methods.
- Local-k-distance radii with symmetric Gaussian-weighted edges.
- Research incubator — do not treat as a production recommendation.
- Full page: [weave_adaptive_radius_graph](../generated/weave_adaptive_radius_graph.md)

### `weave_expression_spatial_graph`

- Build spatial graphs used by domain / SVG methods.
- Spatial-expression fused k-nearest-neighbour graph.
- Research incubator — do not treat as a production recommendation.
- Full page: [weave_expression_spatial_graph](../generated/weave_expression_spatial_graph.md)

### `weave_mutual_knn_graph`

- Build spatial graphs used by domain / SVG methods.
